instruction: Move the picture on page 2 to slide top. Make textboxes underlined on slide 1 and 2.

evaluator.eval: compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/43_1.pptx', 'dest': '43_1.pptx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/ed43c15f-00cb-4054-9c95-62c880865d68/43_1_Gold.pptx', 'dest': '43_1_Gold.pptx'}), examine_shape=False, examine_top_position=True)
